channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Selection Sunday: Duke No. 1 overall in men's tournament, UConn women get top seed
item.description: Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.
item.content:encoded:
Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.

(Image credit: Jacob Kupferman)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Snow and wind batter parts of US, with threat of thunderstorms and tornadoes
item.description: A broad and erratic patchwork of severe weather rumbled across much of the U.S. on Sunday, dumping heavy snow in the Upper Midwest while damaging high winds swept across the Plains.
item.content:encoded:
A broad and erratic patchwork of severe weather rumbled across much of the U.S. on Sunday, dumping heavy snow in the Upper Midwest while damaging high winds swept across the Plains.

(Image credit: BRENDAN SMIALOWSKI)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: As the U.S. population ages rapidly, meet the people stepping up to offer care
item.description: The burden of caring for America's aging population falls on family caregivers. It can take a toll on their lives and mental health.
item.content:encoded: The burden of caring for America's aging population falls on family caregivers. It can take a toll on their lives and mental health.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: A group of friends grew tired of the club scene. They started a monthly dance party
item.description: A group of New Jersey friends love to dance so much that when they got sick of the club scene they started a monthly dance party called, "All My Friends."
item.content:encoded: A group of New Jersey friends love to dance so much that when they got sick of the club scene they started a monthly dance party called, "All My Friends."
item.dc:creator: Buffy Gorrilla

item.title: U.S. Embassy in Baghdad again urges Americans to leave Iraq as Trump touts strikes on Iran
item.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Trump claimed the U.S. had "destroyed 100% of Iran's Military capability." The U.S. Embassy in Baghdad, meanwhile, urged Americans to "leave Iraq immediately."
item.content:encoded:
In a post on Truth Social, President Trump claimed the U.S. had "destroyed 100% of Iran's Military capability." The U.S. Embassy in Baghdad, meanwhile, urged Americans to "leave Iraq immediately."

(Image credit: Jalaa Marey)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Reframing Georgia O'Keeffe's legacy and protecting the land she loved
item.description: Georgia O'Keeffe called the New Mexico high desert "my country," but Pueblo peoples predated her. A more complex view is emerging amid efforts to preserve the land.
item.content:encoded:
Georgia O'Keeffe called the New Mexico high desert "my country," but Pueblo peoples predated her. A more complex view is emerging amid efforts to preserve the land.

(Image credit: Minesh Bacrania for NPR)
item.dc:creator: John Burnett

item.title: These are the casualties and cost of the war in Iran 2 weeks into the conflict
item.description: The war in Iran has already cost the U.S. billions of dollars. Here's the impact by the numbers.
item.content:encoded:
The war in Iran has already cost the U.S. billions of dollars. Here's the impact by the numbers.

(Image credit: Majid Saeedi)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: And the Oscar goes to — wait, why is it called an Oscar?
item.description: The Academy Awards officially adopted the "Oscars" nickname in 1939. But who is Oscar, and who started calling them that? We may never know. But here are four enduring legends to consider.
item.content:encoded:
The Academy Awards officially adopted the "Oscars" nickname in 1939. But who is Oscar, and who started calling them that? We may never know. But here are four enduring legends to consider.

(Image credit: Matt Sayles)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: TSA workers miss a full paycheck, while travelers keep paying airport security fees
item.description: Many TSA workers received no money in their paychecks Friday as the partial DHS shutdown drags on. Fees paid by airline passengers keep piling up, even as airport security officers work without pay.
item.content:encoded:
Many TSA workers received no money in their paychecks Friday as the partial DHS shutdown drags on. Fees paid by airline passengers keep piling up, even as airport security officers work without pay.

(Image credit: Annabelle Gordon)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: How Italy became the darlings (and contenders, too) of the World Baseball Classic
item.description: With espresso shots, kisses on the cheek and Andrea Bocelli singalongs, Team Italy has charmed the baseball world. But their mission is more ambitious: Turn Italy into a bona fide baseball factory.
item.content:encoded:
With espresso shots, kisses on the cheek and Andrea Bocelli singalongs, Team Italy has charmed the baseball world. But their mission is more ambitious: Turn Italy into a bona fide baseball factory.

(Image credit: Alex Slitz)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan
